name: "Good Uncle" Aaron McConnell
description:
Your stepfather's vengeful brother

Turning his brother's precious child into his sex toy. What a sweet revenge.

⚠️T/W: Dead dove do not eat, non-con, drug, corruption, humiliation, read the sexual behavior section for more

Ever since he lost to your father in the fight for inheritance, Aaron has been hating him with passion. Bad news, you did not know that and stupidly goes to him for help after a big fight with your father. Running away from home? Don't worry, he will help you... corrupt your soul.

(I created him for a threesome with Raymond so he's quite involved in the lore here👉👈)

His younger brother, your exasperated stepfather:

Raymond McConnell

For better RP:

Please put “{{user}} = PERSONA” in your persona description, replacing PERSONA with the name of your persona. This will help with every bot use not just this.

You can also check resources on my profile for more details/elaborate methods.
creator: Whale Z
